TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cihafayan Cihafayan u sulit nu Hulam: šł≠ŤąąťÉ®ŤźĹ kakilimaan u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cihafayan. u kasalumaluma' nu Cihafayan sa, 101 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 221 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 183 ku tademaw, pakalatu 83%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 38 ku tademaw, pakalatu 17%. nilacul u sausi nu cidekay a tadamaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 77%, Taluku(Truku) 1%, Tayan(Tayal) 2%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u Pangcah a niyazu' kuyni, tuud ku Pangcah a tademaw itini, uzuma a tademaw sa u Tayan Taluku atu Yuwatan, tuud ku Hulalm. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw ku Sakizaya itini mueneng. cayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 12 a bulad pulung sausi (565,561), Pangcah (211,031), Tayan (90,884), Paywan (101,472), Yuwatan (58,894), Rukay (13,392), Puyuma (14,340), Cou (6,667), Saysiat (6,662), Yami (4,629), Saw (799), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,826), Sakizaya (958), Sejek (10,193), Laaluwa (404), Kanakanabu (343), zuma (11,585) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541)
S.PHON: ¶ińßafajan ¶ińßafajan u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** kakir~…ĺimaan u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶ińßafajan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ¶ińßafajan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tadamaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, tar~…ĺuku(truku) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, tuud ku paŇč ¶ańß a tad…ômaw itini, uzuma a tad…ômaw sa u tajan tar~…ĺuku atu juwatan, tuud ku ńßur~…ĺar~…ĺm. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. ¶ajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: Cihafayan Cihafayan u sulit nu Hulam: šł≠ŤąąťÉ®ŤźĹ kakilimaan u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cihafayan. u kasalumaluma' nu Cihafayan sa, 101 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 221 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 183 ku tademaw, pakalatu 83%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 38 ku tademaw, pakalatu 17%. nilacul u sausi nu cidekay a tadamaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 77%, Taluku(Truku) 1%, Tayan(Tayal) 2%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u Pangcah a niyazu' kuyni, tuud ku Pangcah a tademaw itini, uzuma a tademaw sa u Tayan Taluku atu Yuwatan, tuud ku Hulalm. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw ku Sakizaya itini mueneng. cayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 12 a bulad pulung sausi (565,561), Pangcah (211,031), Tayan (90,884), Paywan (101,472), Yuwatan (58,894), Rukay (13,392), Puyuma (14,340), Cou (6,667), Saysiat (6,662), Yami (4,629), Saw (799), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,826), Sakizaya (958), Sejek (10,193), Laaluwa (404), Kanakanabu (343), zuma (11,585) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541)
S.PHON: ¶ińßafajan ¶ińßafajan u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** kakir~…ĺimaan u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶ińßafajan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ¶ińßafajan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tadamaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, tar~…ĺuku(truku) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, tuud ku paŇč ¶ańß a tad…ômaw itini, uzuma a tad…ômaw sa u tajan tar~…ĺuku atu juwatan, tuud ku ńßur~…ĺar~…ĺm. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. ¶ajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
